channel.title: Azure Chaos Studio on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Azure Chaos Studio on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Manage Azure Chaos Studio from the Azure CLI
item.description:
Azure Chaos Studio now has a public preview Azure CLI extension (az chaos) for creating and running resilience scenarios. It reduces the need to manually craft REST calls and JSON files, and includes a one-step setup command to provision the required workspace and related resources.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Chaos Studio Workspaces and Scenarios
item.description:
Azure Chaos Studio introduces public preview support for Workspaces and Scenarios. Workspaces let you target an application’s scope, such as a subscription, resource group, or service group, to run chaos testing in a more application-centric way.

  • Source: Azure Updates
